name: Conductrics
description: Discover how the Conductrics platform integrates A/B and Multivariate tests, survey data and machine learning for enterprise-level experiments.
dataRetentionPolicy: Data retained for contract duration, deleted upon termination

expertReviews.summaryReport: Conductrics provides privacy-focused A/B testing and experimentation. Data processing is available in both EU and US regions via Google Cloud Platform and Amazon Web Services. Conductrics applies anonymization and K-Anonymity techniques to protect individual-level data. They encrypt data at rest and in transit, and have a comprehensive DPA covering all GDPR and CCPA required clauses at 100%. All six core principles are verified.

transparency.notes: Full transparency on data collection and experimentation practices. Privacy policy and DPA publicly available.

dataMinimization.notes: K-Anonymity and anonymization techniques ensure minimal personal data exposure. Collects only data necessary for experimentation.

accountability.notes: GDPR and CCPA compliant framework. Comprehensive DPA scoring 100% across both regulations. Business Continuity Plan and Data Breach Notification Procedures in place.

security.notes: Encryption at rest and in transit. Annual penetration testing. Infrastructure hosted on GCP and AWS with inherited security certifications.

quality.notes: EU data center availability ensures data sovereignty. K-Anonymity techniques maintain statistical quality while protecting privacy.

participation.notes: Supports DSARs. Designated DPO. Full data subject rights processes in place.
